# Copilot Instructions

## General Guidelines
- Use clear and concise comments in your code to enhance understanding.
- Leverage GitHub Copilot to generate boilerplate code and repetitive patterns.

## Code Style
- Follow consistent naming conventions for variables and functions.
- Use specific formatting rules to maintain readability.

## Project-Specific Rules
- When working on the Vulkan C++ project (VulkanTest), ensure to include necessary libraries such as GLFW, GLM, stb_image, and Assimp.
- Store all shaders in the `VulkanTest\shaders` directory for organization and easy access.
